positive: A stylized, symmetrical central illustration of a mystical creature—a bioluminescent celestial fox—sitting amidst interwoven floral mandalas and stylized crescent moons. The fox should have ethereal, flowing lines and vibrant gradient fur colors (deep indigo, cyan, magenta). The surrounding elements must include detailed, abstract flora and geometric patterns inspired by sacred geometry and Art Nouveau. The composition must be highly contrasted, suitable for silkscreen printing, featuring deep space blacks and pop accents of glowing light. Cinematic volumetric lighting, highly detailed vector illustration style, perfect silhouette, flat graphic design aesthetic.
